author: IGN YouTube
summary: Rustmourneは、古代の放棄された構造物の廊下を探索し、そこに潜む苦悶の存在に立ち向かうSFホラーVRサバイバルゲームです。隠れるか、逃げるか、手足を切断して生き残る必要があります。SteamVR向けに近日発売予定です。
raw_text:
Rustmourne - Official Gameplay Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
Take a look at the Gameplay Trailer for Rustmourne, an upcoming sci-fi horror VR survival game. Players will traverse the corridors of an ancient, derelict structure, and face the tortured beings in it: hide, run, or cut off their limbs to survive. Rustmourne is coming soon to SteamVR.

#ign #gaming

author: Nintendo Everything
summary: ソニックチームの飯塚氏は、全てのソニックタイトルを現行プラットフォームで展開したい意向を表明。可能であれば「魔法のように」実現したいと語った。
raw_text:
Sonic Team head wants all Sonic games on modern platforms, would “magically do it” if possible

If Sonic Team head Takashi Iizuka had his way, he’d have all modern Sonic the Hedgehog games on modern platforms. Iizuka was speaking with Jeremy Klinger about various topics pertaining to the series. At one point, he was asked to select the one game he’d remake if given the opportunity. In response, Iizuka mentioned that he’d love to be able...
